title: Wire net treated as an uwire

features.name: wire to uwire input port connection
features.description: Code should include a wire variable declared as 'wire logic' connected to a module input port declared as 'input uwire logic', causing incorrect uwire promotion

features.name: multi_driver on wire passed to uwire port
features.description: Code should include a wire connected to a uwire input port that has multiple drivers (gate primitive and continuous assignment) violating uwire single-driver rule
